commands.payload:
ChangeDB.ConsoleApp 1.0.0-undefined+a3fa20a
Copyright (C) 2026 Pengbo Yang

  dumpsql      Dump database as sql scripts

  importsql    import sql script to target database

  migration    Migration database from source to target

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

result.stdout:
ChangeDB.ConsoleApp 1.0.0-undefined+a3fa20a
Copyright (C) 2026 Pengbo Yang

  -f, --force                   (Default: false) drop target sql script file if
                                exists

  --dump-scope                  (Default: All) (All/Metadata/Data)

  --name-style                  target object name style (Original/Lower/Upper).

  --max-fetch-bytes             max fetch bytes when read source database (unit
                                KB), default value is 10 (100KB).

  --pre-sql-file                pre sql file, execute these sql script before
                                the migration one-by-one.

  --pre-sql-file-split          (Default: ) pre sql file split chars, default
                                value is ""

  --post-sql-file               post sql file, execute these sql script after
                                the migration one-by-one.

  --post-sql-file-split         (Default: ) post sql file split chars, default
                                value is ""

  --target-default-schema       target database default schema.

  --optimize-insertion          (Default: true) optimize insertion script.

  --hide-progress               (Default: false) hide progress bar.

  --tables                      the tables to include. if empty, include all
                                tables.

  --schemas                     the schemas to include. if empty, include all
                                schemas.

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

  source-dbtype (pos. 1)        Required. source database type.
                                (mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)

  source-connection (pos. 2)    Required. source database connection strings

  target-dbtype (pos. 3)        Required. target database type, default use
                                source database type.
                                (mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)

  output-file (pos. 4)          Required. output script file

result.stdout:
ChangeDB.ConsoleApp 1.0.0-undefined+a3fa20a
Copyright (C) 2026 Pengbo Yang

  -f, --force                   drop target database if exists

  --migration-scope             (Default: All) (All/Metadata/Data)

  --name-style                  target object name style (Original/Lower/Upper).

  --max-fetch-bytes             max fetch bytes when read source database (unit
                                KB), default value is 100 (100KB).

  --pre-sql-file                pre sql file, execute these sql script before
                                the migration one-by-one.

  --pre-sql-file-split          (Default: ) pre sql file split chars, default
                                value is ""

  --post-sql-file               post sql file, execute these sql script after
                                the migration one-by-one.

  --post-sql-file-split         (Default: ) sql file split chars, default value
                                is ""

  --target-default-schema       target database default schema.

  --hide-progress               (Default: false) hide progress bar.

  --tables                      the tables to include. if empty, include all
                                tables.

  --schemas                     the schemas to include. if empty, include all
                                schemas.

  --create-target-database      (Default: New) the behavior of how to create
                                target database (New/ForceNew/Never).

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

  source-dbtype (pos. 1)        Required. source database
                                type.(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)

  source-connection (pos. 2)    Required. source database connection strings

  target-dbtype (pos. 3)        Required. target database
                                type.(mysql/postgres/sqlserver/sqlce)

  target-connection (pos. 4)    Required. target database connection strings
